use_cases: Displaying a developer's technology stack on a portfolio or personal website
Showcasing tech dependencies and integrations in project documentation
Presenting company or team technical infrastructure on about pages
Highlighting skill proficiency through visual tech logo arrangement
Adding an interactive tech stack section to SaaS landing pages
ai_summary: An interactive tech stack display component with a glassmorphism aesthetic featuring a spotlight hover effect that follows the cursor. The component uses framer-motion for smooth animations and displays technology logos/icons against a blurred background image with dark translucent overlays. Commonly used in developer portfolios and SaaS landing pages to showcase technical expertise with engaging micro-interactions.
